original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: European Society of Endocrinology in collaboration with the European Network for the Study of Adrenal Tumors
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: European Society of Endocrinology clinical practice guidelines on the management of adrenal incidentalomas
original_registry_entry.population: People with an incidentally identified adrenal mass, with imaging, hormonal, malignancy-risk, age, pregnancy, frailty, and comorbidity qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Initial adrenal incidentaloma assessment, multidisciplinary review, and qualified follow-up.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for selected imaging, clinical hormone-excess assessment, blood-pressure, hormonal-workup, electrolyte, referral, and follow-up documentation. Surgery, diagnosis, fixed intervals, treatment, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_sections.heading: Assessment of malignancy risk by imaging
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports imaging-report review, CT or MRI context, lesion characteristics, qualified follow-up imaging, and multidisciplinary discussion.

exact_sections.heading: Assessment for hormone excess and comorbidity
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinical signs of hormone excess, blood pressure and hypertension, diabetes context, recommendation-qualified hormonal workup, and electrolytes or hypokalaemia context.

exact_sections.heading: Multidisciplinary discussion and follow-up
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports qualified clinician-arranged multidisciplinary review, referral, hormonal reassessment, and imaging follow-up without prescribing timing universally.

title: European Society of Endocrinology clinical practice guidelines on the management of adrenal incidentalomas
publisher: European Society of Endocrinology in collaboration with the European Network for the Study of Adrenal Tumors
population: People with an incidentally identified adrenal mass, with imaging, hormonal, malignancy-risk, age, pregnancy, frailty, and comorbidity qualifiers.
intended_setting: Initial adrenal incidentaloma assessment, multidisciplinary review, and qualified follow-up.
access_limitations: Official host returned a challenge or shell page rather than guideline content.
